## Checklist for authors
- [ ] SKILL.md frontmatter present and valid (`name`, `description`, `version`, `tags`)
- [ ] Example output included (`skills/<skill-name>/example-output/`) when appropriate
- [ ] Templates added to `LLMWiki/templates/` if applicable
- [ ] LLMWiki index updated to reference new skill/templates
- [ ] Prompts validated in a Claude Cowork sandbox or local runner
- [ ] No secrets or private data committed
